sourceTitle: How to Kickstart and Scale a Marketplace Business – Part 3: Cracking the Chicken-and-Egg Problem 🐣 - Growing Initial Supply
text: **Ask: If you work at any of the companies I looked into:** 1. PLEASE let me know if I got anything wrong. I’ll correct it in the next post. Just reply to this email or DM me [@lennysan](https://twitter.com/lennysan). 2. If you have any other insights to share about what was important early-on for your company (or any marketplace company), I’d love love love to know. Please share! [Sign up now](https://www.lennysnewsletter.com/subscribe?)
